vscode.heroDescription: Get real-time vulnerability detection as you code. VEXLIT for VSCode highlights security issues inline, shows fix suggestions on hover, and integrates with AI-powered remediation.
vscode.featuresDesc: Everything you need for security-first development, right in your IDE.
vscode.feature1Desc: See security issues underlined in real-time as you type. Hardcoded secrets, SQL injection, XSS — detected instantly.
vscode.feature2Desc: Hover over any highlighted issue to see a detailed explanation with CWE reference and suggested fix.
vscode.feature3Desc: Apply AI-generated patches directly from the editor. Powered by Claude for accurate, context-aware fixes.
vscode.feature4Desc: The same powerful rule engine from the CLI and dashboard, running locally in your editor.
vscode.feature5Desc: 200+ secret patterns detected before you accidentally commit API keys, tokens, or passwords.
vscode.feature6Desc: Install and start scanning. No setup, no config files, no sign-up required.
vscode.howTitle: Security at the speed of typing
vscode.howDesc: VEXLIT runs the scan engine locally in your editor, giving you instant feedback without slowing you down.
vscode.ctaTitle: Be the first to try it
vscode.ctaDesc: We're building the VSCode extension now. Get notified when it launches.
